description:
When the walls themselves seem to be alive, there is nowhere to hide. In Cornfield, you find yourself in the middle of a massive, suffocating maze of towering stalks. It is pitch black at night, the dirt paths twist into endless dead ends, and the only warning that you are being hunted is the chilling sound of rustling leaves. A relentless, terrifying monster tracks your every move through the shadows. This is not a combat game; it is a desperate test of navigation and survival.

Finding the exit is only half the battle. A series of complex puzzles and environmental challenges block your path to freedom and demand your full concentration. You must decipher clues and unlock new areas of the maze quickly yet carefully. The true terror of Cornfield lies in striking the right balance between logic and panic. Every second you spend standing still to crack a code gives the beast another second to close the distance.

Test your strategy and nerves in this heart-pounding escape adventure, where one wrong turn could be your last. Keep moving and think fast under pressure to conquer the maze before the terrifying creature catches up to you. 

Will you outsmart the nightmare lurking in the fields, or will you be consumed by the harvest?
